title: encholirium pedicellatum
intro: Encholirium pedicellatum, also known as the golden lilyturf, is a type of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin infections, and fever, due to its ability to promote healing and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
